sections.title: Foundational Synthesis — Regulatory Model & Jurisdiction Assessment
required_elements: Utility type classification (integrated electric, transmission-only, distribution-only, gas, water, IPP)
Regulatory model assessment (fully regulated, partially regulated, merchant/unregulated)
Regulatory jurisdiction quality evaluation (allowed ROE vs. earned ROE gap, rate case processing time, cost recovery mechanisms)
Capital tracker/rider mechanism availability assessment

sections.title: Rate Base Growth — The Earnings Engine
required_elements: Current rate base and projected growth rate documentation
Capital investment drivers identification (grid modernization, renewable integration, electrification, resilience, data center load)
5-year capital plan assessment (maintenance/replacement % vs. growth %)
Capital plan funding mechanism (internal cash flow, equity issuance, debt)
Regulatory recovery mechanisms (capital trackers, forward test years, decoupling) availability
Load growth trajectory assessment (data center additions, EV adoption, industrial reshoring impact)

sections.title: Dividend & Total Return Framework
required_elements: Current dividend yield documentation
Payout ratio analysis (target 60-70% for growth utilities, 70-80% for mature)
Dividend growth rate assessment (target 5-8% for premium utilities)
Dividend growth visibility backed by rate base growth and ROE stability
Total return decomposition (yield + growth + multiple expansion/contraction)

sections.title: Energy Transition Exposure & Risk
required_elements: Renewable generation ownership percentage
Transmission buildout for renewable interconnection assessment
Stranded asset risk evaluation (early coal/gas plant retirement)
Wildfire/climate liability exposure quantification
Data center demand catalyst analysis (MW in queue, timeline, commercial operation probability)

sections.title: Financial Logic & Valuation
required_elements: P/E valuation applied to regulatory earnings
EV/Rate Base valuation framework
Dividend discount model (DDM) analysis
Sum-of-the-parts for renewables-exposed utilities (regulated earnings + contracted renewables assets)

sections.title: Investigation Tracks
required_elements: Upcoming rate case analysis (specific docket review)
Data center interconnection pipeline verification
Wildfire/climate liability quantification

structural_requirements: All sections present with markdown headings
Utility type and regulatory classification clearly stated
Allowed ROE vs. earned ROE gap documented (regulatory lag assessment)
Rate case processing timeline tracked (by jurisdiction)
Rate base growth rate documented with historical trend
5-year capital plan reviewed with maintenance % vs. growth % split
Capital funding sources identified (cash flow %, equity issuance %, debt %)
Regulatory cost recovery mechanisms (capital trackers, forward test years) documented
Load growth assumptions detailed (data center MW additions, EV penetration, industrial reshoring impact)
Dividend yield, growth rate, and sustainability assessed at specific ROE levels
Total return model constructed (yield + growth + multiple assumptions)
Transmission investment for renewable interconnection quantified
Stranded asset risk (coal/gas retirements) timeline and financial impact estimated
Data center demand pipeline quantified (MW contracted, timeline, probability of COD)
Investigation tracks include specific rate case docket numbers, data center interconnection agreements, and climate liability estimates
